name: Nordic Resources Ltd
analysis: NNL's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 13% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (2.2× the 20-day average) — real participation. Price has broken above the base high at A$0.2200. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$0.2400, stop A$0.1732, target A$0.4402 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
